case_title: THE SALVATION ARMY RESIDENCES, INC. vs. MCKINNEY, FRANK C.

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MCKINNEY, FRANK C.

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $80.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE SALVATION ARMY RESIDENCES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MCKINNEY, FRANK C.
